Catalog.

SURGICAL DRAPPING SOLUTIONS

CUSTOMIZED DRAPPING NEEDS IN OPERATION THEATRES

Explore Category

Ancillary Surgical Disposables

Our ancillary range provides complete sterile protection for clinical equipment and surgical staff. From specialized C-Arm and Camera covers to fluid-resistant leggings and shoe covers, we ensure a 360-degree sterile environment.

View Range
Explore Category

Disposable Bed Sheets & Covering

Our disposable bed sheets and covering sheets provide a superior moisture barrier and hygiene. Made from premium SMS and PP Spunbond fabrics as per international clinical standards.

View Range
Explore Category

Disposable Patient Gowns/Kits

Our patient gowns are lightweight, breathable, and provide excellent coverage. Available in various sleeve lengths and complete kits including bouffant caps, shoe covers, and patient towels.

View Range
Explore Category

Disposable Surgeon Gowns

From SMS Standard to Wrap-around Reinforced protection, our surgeon gowns are designed for maximum safety in the OR. Available in various GSMs including poly aprons and isolation gowns.

View Range
Explore Category

General Surgery Drapes

Our general surgery drape packs are engineered for maximum fluid control and sterile field integrity. Includes Universal, Mini, and Specialized sagging packs to meet diverse clinical requirements.

View Range
Explore Category

Gynecology Surgery Drapes

Our gynecology range features amniotic-control SMS fabrics, integrated incise films, and super-absorbent maternity pads. Optimized for patient dignity and clinical efficiency in delivery rooms.

View Range
Explore Category

Orthopedic Surgery Drapes

Designed for high-fluid and high-mechanical stress procedures. Our Ortho drapes feature reinforced adhesive zones, limb sleeves, and integrated fluid collection pouches for Knee, Hip, and Shoulder surgeries.

View Range
Explore Category

Other Surgery Drapes

Comprehensive range of specialized drapes for niche surgical sectors. From CABG cardiac packs to Neurology craniotomy drapes and IVF procedure kits, we provide total sterile solutions for advanced specialties.

View Range
Explore Category

Sterilization Wrapping Sheets

Made from high-performance SMS fabric (43/50 GSM), our wrapping sheets provide an effective microbial barrier. Available in multiple standard dimensions and customized sizes in packs of 25 and 50.

View Range

Bespoke Kits.

Tailored configurations for specialized surgical protocols. We manufacture your vision.
